{{CargoRelic
|name=Jade Ruyi
|class_id=20229
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This is the Jade Ruyi always held by the God of Prosperity. Its shape resembles a long-handled hook, with a flat head like a shell and a smooth surface. Ruyi symbolizes good luck, and the God of Prosperity is the deity in charge of fame and fortune.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +1<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss2=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +2<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss3=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +3<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss4=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +3<br>Incense Used: 20/20
|ss7=Per Incense used, Snail ATK +3<br>Incense Used: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
